allow:
Bash(cd D:/github/copilot-ui && gh pr create --title "fix: use -p flag for claude CLI prompt argument" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Adds `-p` flag to the `claude` CLI command so the prompt is explicitly passed as a prompt argument, not parsed as a CLI option
- Fixes crash when user prompts start with a dash \(e.g. `-m ...`\) causing `error: unknown option` 
- Adds test to verify the `-p` flag is present in the constructed command

## Test plan
- [x] Existing engine tests pass \(8/8\)
- [ ] Manually create a claude session with a prompt starting with `-m` and verify it no longer errors

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
Bash(nvm --version 2>/dev/null || fnm --version 2>/dev/null || echo "no version manager found")

Bash(cd D:/github/agent-deck && gh pr create --title "fix: resolve architect plan output race condition" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- **Fix PTY output race**: Wait for PTY output buffer to drain before reading architect plan output — `node-pty` can fire `onExit` before all `onData` events are delivered, causing the dev agent to receive an empty/truncated plan
- **Prevent architect from implementing**: Rewrite architect prompt to forbid plan mode, code edits, and implementation — auto-respond to architect questions with "just finish the plan"
- **Refactor OfficeView into 2D floor plan**: Extract monolithic OfficeView into modular sprite-based components \(`OfficeFloorPlan`, `CharacterSprite`, `DeskStation`, `SpeechBubble`, `ActionIndicator`\)
- **Add idle agent behaviors**: Agents wander between coffee machine, water cooler, and couch; thinking state shown at desk
- **Add `.nvmrc`** pinning Node 24 to eliminate engine version warnings
- **Fix copilot PowerShell command**: Add `-ExecutionPolicy Bypass` flag

## Test plan
- [ ] Start a workflow and verify architect plan output is fully captured before dev agent starts
- [ ] Verify architect agent does not attempt to implement code
- [ ] Verify idle agents visually wander in the break room area
- [ ] Verify `npm install` produces no engine warnings with Node 24
- [ ] Verify office floor plan renders correctly with working/idle agents

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
